completed_tasks.name: 06.2-01 T1: Scorer calibration with anchored examples + recency weighting
06.2-01 T2: Dimension-aware perspective activation + convergence pressure
06.2-02 T1: CLI renamer fixture, seed injection script, regression tests
06.2-02 T2: Exercise downstream pipeline (seal/decompose/execute)
completed_tasks.progress: Holdout generated (12 scenarios via gemini-3.1-pro-preview), vault sealed, decomposed into 1 bead, execute command dispatched bead to Inngest. Bead execution status not yet confirmed.

remaining_tasks.name: 06.2-03 T1: Run full interview-to-execution pipeline on CLI renamer

blockers.description: OpenAI API key returning 401 - key itself is invalid (not a code issue)
blockers.workaround: Gateway filters out OpenAI and uses Anthropic + Google. User needs to fix their OpenAI key.

blockers.description: Bead execution via Inngest not confirmed - dispatched but status shows 0 beads
blockers.workaround: Need to investigate Inngest handler registration and bead dispatch event routing. Check http://localhost:8288 Inngest dev UI.

blockers.description: dotenv not loading HOLDOUT_ENCRYPTION_KEY from ~/.env reliably
blockers.workaround: Pass explicitly: HOLDOUT_ENCRYPTION_KEY=$(grep HOLDOUT_ENCRYPTION_KEY ~/.env | cut -d= -f2) before CLI commands

human_actions_pending.context: Key returns 401 on all requests. May be expired/rotated/billing issue.

human_actions_pending.action: Remove quotes from all values in ~/.env
human_actions_pending.context: dotenv is not stripping surrounding quotes. All keys had '"value"' format which broke API auth.

decisions.decision: Updated MODEL_FAMILY_MAP and cauldron.config.ts to use current models: gpt-5.4, gpt-5-mini, gemini-3.1-pro-preview
decisions.rationale: Previous models (gpt-4.1, gpt-4o, gemini-2.5-pro) were outdated

decisions.decision: Added quote-stripping in bootstrap.ts for API keys
decisions.rationale: dotenv not auto-stripping quotes from ~/.env values

decisions.decision: Made seal command idempotent for already-approved vaults
decisions.rationale: Re-running seal after vault already approved caused state transition error

next_action: 1. Commit uncommitted bug fixes (model updates, quote stripping, seal idempotency). 2. Debug bead execution: check Inngest dev UI at localhost:8288, verify bead.dispatch_requested event was received, check handler registration. 3. Once bead executes successfully, Plan 06.2-02 Task 2 checkpoint is done. 4. Proceed to Plan 06.2-03 (Wave 2): full interview-to-execution pipeline test.
context_notes: This is a dogfood dry-run phase. Track 1 (interview fixes) is complete. Track 2 (pre-generated seed pipeline) is 90% done — seal/decompose worked, execute dispatched a bead but we haven't confirmed Inngest actually picked it up. The execute command starts a Hono server on port 3001 with Inngest handler. Multiple env issues surfaced: quoted values in ~/.env, missing HOLDOUT_ENCRYPTION_KEY, invalid OpenAI key. All were worked around but the root cause (quoted .env values) should be fixed permanently by removing quotes from ~/.env.
